{"job_title":"Senior Site Reliability Engineer","company":"Docusign","summary":"
Results-driven Senior Site Reliability Engineer with 8+ years of experience in Site Reliability Engineering, DevOps, or Software Engineering roles leading large-scale production systems at scale. Expertise in designing, implementing, and operating highly available, scalable services in cloud environments. Proven track record of improving reliability, scalability, and performance across teams and partner closely with product engineering, platform, security, and release management to ship changes safely and quickly. Driven by metrics and analytics, this role is a unique opportunity to impact the entire DocuSign team and drive adoption.

"experience":[{"role":"Senior Site Reliability Engineer","company":"Docusign","location":"Remote","dates":"Mon YYYY - Mon YYYY","details":["Architected X using Y, cutting Z by 40%","Led a team of 8 to deliver ... on time","Automated ... reducing manual toil by 200+ hours/quarter","Reduced MTTR from 45m to 9m by ...","Scaled platform to handle 3x traffic with 99.95% uptime"]},
{"role":"Senior Site Reliability Engineer","company":"Docusign","location":"Remote","dates":"Mon YYYY - Mon YYYY","details":["Designed and implemented logging, metrics, tracing, and alerting for complex distributed systems; ensured signals were actionable and aligned to business impact","Developed robust, well-tested tooling and shared libraries adopted across multiple teams","Improved CI/CD pipelines and guardrails to reduce change failure rate while increasing deployment velocity","Built and automated tools and solutions for incident impact analysis and effective mitigation"]}]}
